_comment: AAMC section distribution by scored multiple-choice question count (230 total). R5 overall readiness weights each section's mean per-topic readiness by these; all four sections stay in the denominator, so untested sections drag the overall down (anti-overconfidence). Keys are the four canonical section codes (see SECTIONS in performance.rs); a topic maps to its section via the first segment of its aamc::<section>::<topic> tag (section_of). Sub-topic weighting within a section is uniform — AAMC publishes counts only per section. Edit these counts to retune.
